chinese: 认知负荷

english: The pushback on replacing the hamburger menu wasn't about data — it was status quo bias. We ran a quick prototype test to separate genuine preference from familiarity.
chinese: 对替换汉堡菜单的抵触并不来自数据，而是现状偏见。我们做了一轮快速原型测试，区分了真实偏好和单纯的习惯惯性。

english: status quo bias
chinese: 现状偏见

english: We were all excited about the new direction, which is exactly when confirmation bias is most dangerous. I asked someone outside the team to run usability sessions so we weren't selectively hearing what we wanted.
chinese: 我们对新方向都很兴奋，而这恰恰是确认偏差最危险的时候。我请了团队外的人来主持可用性测试，这样我们就不会只听自己想听的反馈。

english: confirmation bias
chinese: 确认偏差

english: The core flow covered 60% of transactions. But the long tail — address exceptions, payment failures, partial refunds — that's where trust broke down. We had to design for the whole distribution.
chinese: 核心流程覆盖了60%的交易。但长尾——地址异常、支付失败、部分退款——恰恰是信任断裂的地方。我们必须为整个分布设计，而不只是主路径。

english: long tail
chinese: 长尾

english: After launch we got hundreds of pieces of feedback — separating signal vs. noise is where design judgment matters most.
chinese: 上线后我们收到了数百条反馈——把信号从噪声中分离出来，正是设计判断力最关键的地方。

english: signal vs. noise
chinese: 信号与噪声

english: The component structure we chose in year one created path dependency that made scaling painful later. It taught me to pressure-test early architectural decisions more carefully.
chinese: 第一年选定的组件结构形成了路径依赖，让后来的规模化变得非常痛苦。这件事让我学会了更认真地压力测试早期的架构决策。

english: path dependency
chinese: 路径依赖

english: We spent six weeks on a feature research consistently showed users didn't care about. The team kept going because of what we'd invested — classic sunk cost fallacy. I eventually escalated to kill it.
chinese: 我们在一个用户研究反复证明他们不在意的功能上花了六周。团队因为已经投入了这么多而继续推进——典型的沉没成本谬误。最终我选择升级决策，把它砍掉了。

english: sunk cost fallacy
chinese: 沉没成本谬误

english: The review feature created a network effect: more reviews made the product more useful for new users, which drove sign-ups, which drove more reviews. Design had to support that loop.
chinese: 评价功能产生了网络效应：评价越多，产品对新用户越有价值，进而带来更多注册，进而带来更多评价。设计必须支撑这个循环。

english: network effect
chinese: 网络效应

english: Simplifying the filter UI tested well — but we hadn't mapped the second-order effects. Power users relied on those controls, and support tickets spiked after launch.
chinese: 简化筛选界面的测试结果很好——但我们没有梳理二阶效应。高级用户依赖那些精细控件，上线后支持工单激增。

english: second-order effects
chinese: 二阶效应

english: After the third polish round, I called it. We were hitting diminishing returns — each change was smaller and more contentious, and bigger problems were waiting.
chinese: 第三轮打磨之后，我叫停了。我们已经到了边际效益递减的阶段——每次改动越来越小、争议越来越大，而更重要的问题还在等待。

english: diminishing returns
chinese: 边际效益递减

english: The brief was 'improve search results,' but I used that as a chance to reframe the problem entirely: users needed better recovery when results were poor.
chinese: 需求文档写的是「优化搜索结果」，但我把这当成一个重新定义问题的机会：用户真正需要的是在结果不好时更好的兜底体验。

english: reframe
chinese: 重新定义问题

english: Two weeks, one engineer — I've learned to treat constraint as catalyst. It forces you to find the smallest thing that validates the core hypothesis.
chinese: 两周时间，一名工程师——我学会了把限制当作催化剂。它逼你找到能验证核心假设的最小解法。

english: constraint as catalyst
chinese: 限制即催化剂

english: Rather than looking at how competitors solved it, I started from first-principles thinking: what does this user need to accomplish, and what's the simplest path to get there?
chinese: 我没有去参考竞品是怎么做的，而是从第一性原理出发：这个用户需要完成什么，到达那里最简单的路径是什么？

english: first-principles thinking
chinese: 第一性原理

english: I stopped showing high-fidelity mocks first in reviews. Once stakeholders see a polished version, the anchoring effect kicks in — every critique becomes relative to that frame, not the actual problem.
chinese: 我不再在评审会上先展示高保真稿。一旦利益相关方看到精致版本，锚定效应就会生效——之后所有评论都会以那个稿子为参照，而不是真正的用户问题。

english: anchoring effect
chinese: 锚定效应

english: With four designers covering three product areas, I kept asking: what's the high-leverage work right now? Sometimes that was a two-hour doc that unblocked three engineers.
chinese: 四个设计师覆盖三个产品方向，我一直在问：现在最高杠杆的工作是什么？有时候是花两小时写一份文档，解锁了三名工程师。

english: high-leverage work
chinese: 高杠杆工作

english: When I joined, so much context lived as tribal knowledge in a few engineers' heads. I made it a priority to document that in the first 60 days — both for myself and for future hires.
chinese: 加入团队时，大量背景信息以部落知识的形式藏在几位工程师脑子里。我把文档化这些内容列为前60天的首要任务——既是为了自己，也是为了未来的新成员。

english: tribal knowledge
chinese: 部落知识

english: Cross-functional work at that scale comes with a high alignment tax. I introduced a lightweight decision log and it cut our recurring sync meetings by half.
chinese: 那个规模的跨职能协作本身就带有很高的对齐成本。我引入了一个轻量级的决策日志，把例行同步会议减少了一半。

english: alignment tax
chinese: 对齐成本

english: The team had been overruled on so many quality calls that they'd stopped pushing back. It wasn't apathy — it was learned helplessness. Rebuilding the expectation that design input changes outcomes was part of my job.
chinese: 团队在太多质量决策上被推翻，已经停止反驳了。这不是冷漠，是习得性无助。重建「设计输入真的能影响结果」的预期，是我工作的一部分。

english: learned helplessness
chinese: 习得性无助

english: After a major bug incident, the team wanted to overhaul the entire error flow. I pushed back — I was worried recency bias was making one high-visibility failure look like a systemic pattern.
chinese: 一次重大 bug 事件之后，团队想要全面重做错误处理流程。我提出了异议——我担心近因偏差让一个高曝光的失败看起来像是系统性问题。

english: recency bias
chinese: 近因偏差

english: We treated the design system as a flywheel effect in action — the first few months felt slow, but once engineers started shipping faster, the whole org leaned in and it became self-reinforcing.
chinese: 我们把设计系统看作飞轮效应的实践——前几个月感觉很慢，但一旦工程师们开始更快地交付，整个组织都投入其中，它变成了自我强化的循环。

english: flywheel effect
chinese: 飞轮效应

english: Investing in the design system early gave us compounding returns — by year two, new surfaces were launching in half the time because teams weren't rebuilding foundational components from scratch.
chinese: 早期投入设计系统让我们获得了复利效应——到第二年，新产品界面的上线时间缩短了一半，因为团队不再需要从头重建基础组件。

english: compounding returns
chinese: 复利效应

english: Design taste isn't about having opinions — it's calibrated judgment, knowing when something is off and being able to diagnose why. That develops over time and through a lot of critical review.
chinese: 设计品味不是关于有没有观点——而是一种经过校准的判断力，知道什么时候有问题，并且能够诊断出原因。这需要时间积累和大量批判性评审。

english: design taste
chinese: 设计品味

english: At my level, I try to be a force multiplier for the team rather than just an individual contributor — the systems I build and the culture I set should make everyone around me more effective.
chinese: 在我这个层级，我努力成为团队的力量倍增器，而不只是个人贡献者——我搭建的系统和我树立的文化，应该让我身边的每个人都更高效。

english: force multiplier
chinese: 力量倍增器

english: One thing I look for in a role is how much autonomy design actually has — not just visual decisions, but framing problems, pushing back on scope, and having a seat at the table when product direction is set.
chinese: 我在评估一个职位时，很看重设计能有多大的自主性——不只是视觉决策，还包括定义问题框架、对需求提出异议，以及在产品方向制定时有发言权。

english: autonomy
chinese: 自主性

english: hybrid IC/people-manager role
chinese: 兼具 IC 和人员管理职责的角色

english: My background is closest to a hybrid IC/people-manager role, where I led people while still owning high-priority design work.
chinese: 我的背景更接近兼具 IC 和人员管理职责的角色，既带团队，也负责高优先级设计工作。

english: large-scale platform UX
chinese: 大规模平台 UX

english: A large part of my experience is in large-scale platform UX, especially products with hundreds of millions of active users.
chinese: 我很大一部分经验来自大规模平台 UX，尤其是拥有数亿活跃用户的产品。

english: billion-user ecosystem
chinese: 十亿级用户生态

english: Baidu App gave me the opportunity to design within a billion-user ecosystem where small experience changes could have major impact.
chinese: 百度 App 让我有机会在十亿级用户生态中做设计，微小体验变化也可能带来巨大影响。

english: flagship mobile app
chinese: 旗舰移动应用
highlightOverrides: flagship mobile search and information app

english: I spent multiple years designing for Baidu App, Baidu's flagship mobile search and information app.
chinese: 我多年参与百度 App 的设计，它是百度的旗舰移动搜索和信息应用。

english: consumer-facing product
chinese: 面向消费者的产品

english: Most of my career has been focused on consumer-facing products with high-frequency usage.
chinese: 我的职业经历大多聚焦在高频使用的 C 端产品上。

english: business awareness
chinese: 商业意识

english: I bring business awareness to design decisions, especially when user experience and monetization need to be balanced.
chinese: 我在设计决策中会带入商业意识，尤其是在用户体验和商业化需要平衡时。

english: outcome-driven design
chinese: 结果导向设计

english: I try to practice outcome-driven design, connecting design choices with user behavior, business metrics, and delivery constraints.
chinese: 我倾向于做结果导向设计，把设计选择和用户行为、业务指标、交付约束联系起来。

english: platform-scale systems
chinese: 平台级系统

english: I am used to designing platform-scale systems rather than isolated features.
chinese: 我习惯设计平台级系统，而不是孤立功能。

english: experience framework
chinese: 体验框架

english: For Duxiaoxiao, I helped define an experience framework that connected character, conversation, spatial containers, and controls.
chinese: 在度晓晓项目中，我帮助定义了连接角色、对话、空间容器和控件的体验框架。

english: multimodal interaction
chinese: 多模态交互

english: My AI product work involved multimodal interaction across voice, facial expression, motion, lip sync, and interface controls.
chinese: 我的 AI 产品工作涉及语音、表情、动作、口型同步和界面控件等多模态交互。

english: emotionally expressive interaction
chinese: 有情感表达力的交互

english: Duxiaoxiao taught me how emotionally expressive interaction can change the way users perceive an AI assistant.
chinese: 度晓晓让我理解有情感表达力的交互如何改变用户对 AI 助手的感知。

english: conversational intent
chinese: 对话意图

english: In the AI search flow, we had to distinguish conversational intent from traditional search intent.
chinese: 在 AI 搜索流程中，我们需要区分对话意图和传统搜索意图。

english: search intent
chinese: 搜索意图

english: A key design challenge was deciding when to keep the user in conversation and when to surface search results.
chinese: 一个关键的设计挑战是决定何时让用户留在对话中，何时展示搜索结果。

english: character and brand asset system
chinese: 角色与品牌资产系统

english: I led the creation of a character and brand asset system to support Duxiaoxiao's content and commercial use cases.
chinese: 我主导建立了角色与品牌资产系统，用于支持度晓晓的内容和商业场景。

english: 3D content production pipeline
chinese: 3D 内容生产流程

english: We built a 3D content production pipeline so the team could support campaigns, videos, and brand collaborations more efficiently.
chinese: 我们建立了 3D 内容生产流程，让团队更高效地支持活动、视频和品牌合作。

english: reusable asset library
chinese: 可复用资产库

english: For high-frequency production needs, I pushed the team toward reusable asset libraries instead of one-off creative work.
chinese: 面对高频生产需求，我推动团队建设可复用资产库，而不是每次都做一次性创意。

english: algorithmic feed
chinese: 算法信息流

english: I advocated for making the algorithmic feed more prominent on the Baidu App homepage.
chinese: 我主张提高算法信息流在百度 App 首页上的战略位置。

english: homepage redesign
chinese: 首页改版

english: One of my portfolio-defining projects was the Baidu App homepage redesign, which connected product strategy with measurable business impact.
chinese: 我作品集中最有代表性的项目之一是百度 App 首页改版，它把产品策略和可衡量业务影响连接起来。

english: homepage hierarchy
chinese: 首页层级

english: We adjusted the homepage hierarchy to better balance search, content discovery, and business needs.
chinese: 我们调整了首页层级，以更好平衡搜索、内容发现和业务需求。

english: attention routing
chinese: 用户注意力引导

english: The homepage required careful attention routing across search, content, and business surfaces, so every design decision involved strict trade-offs.
chinese: 首页需要在搜索、内容和业务界面之间进行谨慎的用户注意力引导，因此每个设计决策都涉及严格的权衡。

english: content distribution strategy
chinese: 内容分发策略

english: I learned how design connects with content distribution strategy in a high-traffic product.
chinese: 我学会了设计如何与高流量产品的内容分发策略相连接。

english: mature, highly competitive market
chinese: 成熟且竞争激烈的市场

english: The homepage redesign happened in a mature, highly competitive market where time spent and retention became critical.
chinese: 首页改版发生在成熟且竞争激烈的市场中，用户时长和留存变得非常关键。

english: business constraints
chinese: 业务约束

english: I am comfortable designing under business constraints, especially when different teams have competing priorities.
chinese: 我很适应在业务约束下进行设计，尤其是当不同团队有着冲突的优先级时。

english: organizational constraints
chinese: 组织约束

english: Large-company design work taught me to treat organizational constraints as part of the design problem.
chinese: 大公司设计经验让我学会把组织约束也视为设计问题的一部分。

english: cross-functional collaboration
chinese: 跨职能协作

english: My work required close cross-functional collaboration with product, engineering, AI, data, growth, marketing, and commercial teams.
chinese: 我的工作需要和产品、工程、AI、数据、增长、市场和商业团队紧密跨职能协作。

english: distributed resources
chinese: 分散的资源

english: I have experience moving projects forward even when resources are distributed across many teams.
chinese: 我拥有推进项目的经验，即使是在资源分散于多个团队的情况下。

english: ambiguous goals
chinese: 模糊目标

english: In emerging AI projects, I often had to turn ambiguous goals into clear workstreams.
chinese: 在新兴 AI 项目中，我经常需要把模糊目标转化为清晰工作流。

english: executable path
chinese: 可执行路径

english: My role was often to translate an abstract direction into an executable path for design and engineering teams.
chinese: 我的角色经常是把抽象方向转化为设计和工程团队可以执行的路径。

english: workstream
chinese: 工作流

english: I broke the digital human project into workstreams across interaction, character assets, 3D production, and commercial scenarios.
chinese: 我把数字人项目拆成交互、角色资产、3D 生产和商业场景等工作流。

english: traffic-split experiment
chinese: 流量拆分实验

english: We used traffic-split experiments to evaluate whether the homepage redesign improved user behavior.
chinese: 我们使用流量拆分实验来评估首页改版是否改善用户行为。

english: data-informed design
chinese: 数据辅助设计

english: My approach is data-informed design, combining metrics with product judgment and user feedback.
chinese: 我的方式是数据辅助设计，把指标、产品判断和用户反馈结合起来。

english: experimental validation
chinese: 实验验证

english: Experimental validation helped us make design decisions that were easier for stakeholders to trust.
chinese: 实验验证帮助我们做出更容易被利益相关方信任的设计决策。

english: user satisfaction
chinese: 用户满意度

english: We looked at user satisfaction alongside engagement metrics, because growth alone was not enough.
chinese: 我们把用户满意度和参与度指标一起看，因为只看增长是不够的。

english: time spent
chinese: 时长

english: Time spent was one of the key metrics in the Baidu App homepage redesigns.
chinese: 用户时长是百度 App 首页改版中的关键指标之一。

english: daily active users
chinese: 日活跃用户

english: Baidu App reached about 200 million daily active users, so design decisions had to be made very carefully.
chinese: 百度 App 日活约 2 亿，因此设计决策必须非常谨慎。

english: monthly active users
chinese: 月活跃用户

english: Designing for a product with about 700 million monthly active users taught me to think at system scale.
chinese: 为月活约 7 亿的产品做设计让我学会从系统规模思考。

english: annualized revenue growth
chinese: 年化收入增长

english: The 2020 homepage redesign was estimated by the data science team to contribute roughly RMB 100 million in annualized revenue growth.
chinese: 2020 年的首页改版，据数据科学团队估算，贡献了大约 1 亿元人民币的年化收入增长。

english: monetization revenue
chinese: 商业化收入

english: Duxiaoxiao supported over RMB 100 million in monetization revenue through content operations and brand collaborations.
chinese: 度晓晓通过内容运营和品牌合作支持了超过 1 亿元人民币的商业化收入。

english: commercial use case
chinese: 商业化用例

english: I try to understand not only the user journey, but also the commercial use cases behind the product.
chinese: 我不仅会理解用户旅程，也会理解产品背后的商业化用例。

english: in-product campaign
chinese: 产品内活动

english: I helped build in-product campaign capabilities for Baidu App's high-traffic homepage.
chinese: 我帮助建设了百度 App 高流量首页的产品内活动能力。

english: monetization surface
chinese: 商业化界面位置

english: The homepage became a monetization surface, but we needed strict rules to protect the core user experience.
chinese: 首页成为商业化界面位置，但我们需要严格规则来保护核心用户体验。

english: mutual-exclusion rules
chinese: 互斥规则

english: We created mutual-exclusion rules so promotional placements would not overwhelm the homepage.
chinese: 我们建立互斥规则，避免促销位置过度占据首页。

english: review process
chinese: 评审流程

english: I pushed for a review process to control the quality and frequency of homepage marketing placements.
chinese: 我推动建立评审流程，控制首页营销位置的质量和频率。

english: design infrastructure
chinese: 设计基础设施

english: I see design infrastructure as a way to improve consistency, delivery efficiency, and implementation quality across teams.
chinese: 我视设计基础设施为一种在各个团队中提升一致性、交付效率和落地质量的方法。

english: platform-level design system
chinese: 平台级设计系统

english: I have led platform-level design system work for Baidu App and Baidu's mobile product ecosystem.
chinese: 我主导过百度 App 和百度移动产品生态的平台级设计系统工作。

english: design guidelines
chinese: 设计规范

english: I often turn recurring design decisions into clear design guidelines that other teams can follow.
chinese: 我经常把反复出现的设计决策转化为其他团队可遵循的清晰设计规范。

english: reusable patterns
chinese: 可复用模式

english: Reusable patterns helped us reduce repeated communication and improve design consistency.
chinese: 可复用模式帮助我们减少重复沟通，并提升设计一致性。

english: implementation fidelity
chinese: 实现还原度

english: I care about implementation fidelity because the final user experience depends on what actually ships.
chinese: 我重视实现还原度，因为最终用户体验取决于真正上线的东西。

english: delivery efficiency
chinese: 交付效率

english: Good design infrastructure improved delivery efficiency across many parallel business teams.
chinese: 好的设计基础设施提升了多个并行业务团队的交付效率。

english: design quality standards and review process
chinese: 设计质量标准和评审流程
highlightOverrides: design quality standards and a clear review process

english: In large organizations, design quality standards and a clear review process are just as important as individual design craft.
chinese: 在大型组织中，设计质量标准和清晰的评审流程与个人设计手艺同样重要。

english: dark mode system
chinese: 深色模式系统

english: I led the dark mode system for Baidu's mobile products, covering visual hierarchy, readability, and engineering rollout.
chinese: 我主导了百度移动产品的深色模式系统，覆盖视觉层级、可读性和工程落地。

english: readability
chinese: 可读性

english: In dark mode design, I paid close attention to readability, contrast, and low-light usage contexts.
chinese: 在深色模式设计中，我非常关注可读性、对比度和低光使用场景。

english: motion system
chinese: 动效系统

english: I led Baidu App's motion system work to make feedback, transitions, and promotional animations more consistent.
chinese: 我主导了百度 App 的动效系统，让反馈、转场和营销活动动画更加一致。

english: state feedback
chinese: 状态反馈

english: Motion should support state feedback, not just make the interface look more dynamic.
chinese: 动效应该支持状态反馈，而不只是让界面看起来更动。

english: page transition
chinese: 页面转场

english: We defined page transition principles so navigation felt more natural across the app.
chinese: 我们定义了页面转场原则，让整个 App 的导航更自然。

english: prototype validation
chinese: 原型验证

english: Prototype validation is especially useful when static screens cannot explain motion, AI, or 3D interaction clearly.
chinese: 当静态页面无法清楚解释动效、AI 或 3D 交互时，原型验证尤其有用。

english: design-to-code prototyping
chinese: 设计到代码原型

english: My design-to-code prototyping experience includes React, Three.js, GSAP, HTML, and CSS.
chinese: 我的设计到代码原型经验包括 React、Three.js、GSAP、HTML 和 CSS。

english: frontend collaboration
chinese: 前端协作

english: Because I understand frontend implementation, I can collaborate with engineers with more precision.
chinese: 因为我理解前端实现，所以能更精准地和工程师协作。

english: feasibility validation
chinese: 可行性验证

english: For emerging interaction ideas, I often use prototypes for feasibility validation before committing to a full product direction.
chinese: 对新兴交互想法，我经常先用原型做可行性验证，再决定完整产品方向。

english: design-engineering fluency
chinese: 设计工程沟通能力

english: My design-engineering fluency allows me to move between concept, prototype, and implementation discussion.
chinese: 我的设计工程沟通能力让我能在概念、原型和实现讨论之间切换。

english: AI-assisted coding
chinese: AI 辅助编码

english: I use AI-assisted coding mainly to accelerate design prototypes and explore interaction ideas.
chinese: 我使用 AI 辅助编码主要是为了加速设计原型和探索交互想法。

english: implementation-ready UI
chinese: 可实现的 UI

english: I try to produce implementation-ready UI, not just visually attractive concepts.
chinese: 我会尽量产出可实现的 UI，而不只是视觉上好看的概念。

english: end-to-end experience
chinese: 端到端体验

english: In the Life+ business, I refined the end-to-end experience from service discovery to consumption conversion.
chinese: 在 Life+ 业务中，我优化了从服务发现到消费转化的端到端体验。

english: service discovery
chinese: 服务发现

english: For local commerce, service discovery had to be fast, relevant, and easy to act on.
chinese: 对本地生活业务来说，服务发现必须快速、相关且便于行动。

english: benefit redemption
chinese: 权益领取

english: We optimized the flow from benefit redemption to completed consumption in Baidu App's local services.
chinese: 我们优化了百度 App 本地服务中从权益领取到完成消费的流程。

english: local commerce
chinese: 本地生活商业

english: My local commerce work helped Baidu App connect search-driven intent with offline service consumption.
chinese: 我的本地生活项目帮助百度 App 把搜索驱动的意图和线下服务消费连接起来。

english: GMV growth
chinese: 交易额增长

english: In the local commerce vertical, design supported GMV growth by improving entry points, benefits, and conversion paths.
chinese: 在本地生活垂类中，设计通过优化入口、权益和转化路径支持 GMV 增长。

english: content consumption
chinese: 内容消费

english: The web fiction project extended Baidu App from information retrieval into content consumption.
chinese: 小说阅读项目让百度 App 从信息检索延伸到内容消费。

english: immersive reading experience
chinese: 沉浸式阅读体验

english: I improved the immersive reading experience across book discovery, detail pages, chapter lists, and the reader interface.
chinese: 我优化了从找书、详情页、目录到阅读器界面的沉浸式阅读体验。

english: information retrieval
chinese: 信息检索

english: Search products are not only about information retrieval; they also shape how users discover, trust, and act on information.
chinese: 搜索产品不只是信息检索，也影响用户如何发现、信任并使用信息。

english: proactive recommendation
chinese: 主动推荐

english: Baidu App's contextual cards explored a shift from active search to proactive recommendation.
chinese: 百度 App 的情境卡片探索了从主动搜索到主动推荐的转变。

english: contextual card system
chinese: 情境卡片系统

english: Early in my Baidu career, I owned the contextual card system on the Baidu App homepage, a proactive experience similar to Google Now.
chinese: 在我刚加入百度的那段时间，我主导了百度 App 首页的情境卡片系统，这是一种类似于 Google Now 的主动服务体验。

english: geofencing
chinese: 地理围栏

english: The contextual card experience used signals like geofencing, time, search history, and user interests.
chinese: 情境卡片体验使用了地理围栏、时间、搜索历史和用户兴趣等信号。

english: strategy to attract younger users
chinese: 吸引年轻用户的策略

english: I led a research initiative on how Baidu App could attract younger users by identifying gaps in content, community, personalization, and visual appeal.
chinese: 我主导了一项关于百度 App 如何吸引年轻用户的研究，方法是识别内容、社区、个性化和视觉吸引力方面的差距。

english: competitive landscape
chinese: 竞争格局

english: I often combine user behavior, market trends, and the competitive landscape when forming design strategy.
chinese: 我在形成设计策略时经常结合用户行为、市场趋势和竞争格局。

english: market trend
chinese: 市场趋势

english: My homepage redesign judgment was partly based on the market trend toward algorithmic content feeds.
chinese: 我对首页改版的判断部分基于算法内容流这一市场趋势。

english: product positioning
chinese: 产品定位

english: For Baidu News, I helped translate a new product positioning into tone, information hierarchy, and reading experience.
chinese: 在百度新闻项目中，我帮助把新的产品定位转化为语气、信息层级和阅读体验。

english: product tone and personality
chinese: 产品语气和气质

english: The Baidu News redesign gave the product a clearer professional tone and a more trustworthy personality.
chinese: 百度新闻改版让产品形成了更清晰的专业语气和更可信的产品气质。

english: trustworthy experience
chinese: 可信体验

english: For news products, a trustworthy experience depends on tone, hierarchy, readability, and content presentation.
chinese: 对新闻产品来说，可信体验取决于语气、层级、可读性和内容呈现。

english: design craft
chinese: 设计手艺

english: I care about design craft, but I usually connect it back to product structure and user outcomes.
chinese: 我重视设计手艺，但通常会把它连接回产品结构和用户结果。

english: visual polish
chinese: 视觉打磨

english: Visual polish matters, but in my work it needs to support clarity, hierarchy, and product goals.
chinese: 视觉打磨很重要，但在我的工作中它需要服务于清晰度、层级和产品目标。

english: brand expression
chinese: 品牌表达

english: In Duxiaoxiao, brand expression was deeply connected with character behavior, interaction, and content production.
chinese: 在度晓晓中，品牌表达和角色行为、交互及内容生产紧密相关。

english: product narrative
chinese: 产品叙事

english: I try to build a clear product narrative that explains the problem, the constraints, the design choices, and the results.
chinese: 我会构建清晰的产品叙事，解释问题、约束、设计选择和结果。

english: portfolio-defining project
chinese: 代表性作品集项目

english: Duxiaoxiao and Baidu App are my two portfolio-defining projects.
chinese: 度晓晓和百度 App 是我最具代表性的两个作品集项目。

english: measurable impact
chinese: 可衡量影响

english: I prefer to discuss design work through measurable impact, not only process and visuals.
chinese: 我更愿意通过可衡量影响来讨论设计工作，而不只是过程和视觉。

english: granted patents in China
chinese: 中国授权专利

english: I hold three invention patents and twenty-two GUI design patents granted in China.
chinese: 我拥有三项发明专利和二十二项 GUI 外观设计专利，均为中国授权专利。

english: internal instructor
chinese: 内部讲师

english: I served as a Baidu-authorized internal instructor for high-fidelity prototyping and exploratory innovation design.
chinese: 我曾担任百度认证内部讲师，教授高保真原型和探索式创新设计。

english: talent development
chinese: 人才发展

english: As a manager, I focused on talent development, design standards, collaboration quality, and hands-on project outcomes.
chinese: 作为管理者，我关注人才发展、设计标准、协作质量和一线项目结果。

english: final-round design interviews
chinese: 终面设计面试

english: I was authorized to conduct final-round design interviews at Baidu, which helped me develop strong assessment judgment.
chinese: 我曾被授权在百度进行设计终面，这帮助我建立起了敏锐的评估判断能力。

english: performance review
chinese: 绩效评审

english: I completed Baidu's people-manager training and approval process, including performance reviews and promotion-related responsibilities.
chinese: 我完成过百度人员管理者培训和审批流程，包括绩效评审和晋升相关职责。

english: promotion success rate
chinese: 晋升成功率
highlightOverrides: promotion had a 100 percent success rate

english: During the period I managed the team, eligible team members who pursued promotion had a 100 percent success rate.
chinese: 在我管理团队期间，符合条件并申请晋升的成员晋升成功率为 100%。

english: domain expert
chinese: 领域专家

english: Baidu's investment and M&A team invited me as a virtual human domain expert to evaluate potential investment targets.
chinese: 百度投资并购团队曾邀请我作为数字人领域专家评估潜在投资标的。

english: industry insight
chinese: 行业洞察

english: I have shared industry insights on AI digital humans, intelligent interaction, and design practice at conferences and universities.
chinese: 我曾在会议和高校分享关于 AI 数字人、智能交互和设计实践的行业洞察。

english: available to start immediately
chinese: 可立即入职

english: I am available to interview immediately and available to start immediately.
chinese: 我可以立即面试，也可以立即入职。

english: open to remote, hybrid, and onsite work
chinese: 接受远程、混合和现场办公

english: I am open to remote, hybrid, and onsite work, with a preference for Canada-based opportunities.
chinese: 我接受远程、混合和现场办公，优先考虑加拿大机会。

english: role fit
chinese: 岗位匹配度

english: I see a strong role fit when the team values product complexity, design systems, technical fluency, and business impact.
chinese: 当团队重视产品复杂度、设计系统、技术理解力和业务影响时，我认为岗位匹配度会很高。

english: career transition
chinese: 职业转型

english: My career transition to Canada was about expanding my technical foundation and broadening my product perspective beyond one market.
chinese: 我向加拿大的职业转型，在于拓展技术基础，并拓宽超越单一市场的产品视角。

english: comfort zone
chinese: 舒适区

english: Leaving Baidu was a decision to step outside my comfort zone after ten years in one major product ecosystem.
chinese: 离开百度是我在一个大型产品生态工作十年后，走出舒适区的决定。

english: hands-on contribution
chinese: 一线贡献

english: Even while managing designers, I continued to make hands-on contributions to high-impact projects.
chinese: 即使在管理设计师期间，我仍持续对高影响力项目做一线贡献。

english: strategic design judgment
chinese: 战略性设计判断

english: My strategic design judgment comes from connecting user needs, market shifts, technical possibilities, and business goals.
chinese: 我的战略性设计判断来自对用户需求、市场变化、技术可能性和业务目标的连接。

english: strategic input
chinese: 战略输入

english: In senior design roles, I see design as an important source of strategic input, not only execution support.
chinese: 在高级设计角色中，我认为设计是重要的战略输入来源，而不只是执行支持。

english: project scoping
chinese: 项目范围定义

english: I often contribute to project scoping by clarifying user value, technical risk, business priority, and delivery effort.
chinese: 我经常通过澄清用户价值、技术风险、业务优先级和交付成本来参与项目范围定义。

english: prioritization decision
chinese: 优先级决策

english: Good prioritization decisions require a shared understanding of impact, effort, risk, and timing.
chinese: 好的优先级决策需要共同理解影响、成本、风险和时机。

english: shared value
chinese: 共同价值

english: My goal is usually to find shared value across users, the business, and the teams that need to deliver the product.
chinese: 我的目标通常是在用户、业务和交付团队之间找到共同价值。

english: implementation mechanism
chinese: 实现机制

english: For dark mode, we worked with engineering to define implementation mechanisms across multiple technology stacks.
chinese: 在深色模式项目中，我们和工程团队一起定义了跨多个技术栈的实现机制。

english: one-click conversion tool
chinese: 一键转换工具

english: We developed design tool plugins for one-click conversion to dark mode and night mode.
chinese: 我们开发了设计工具插件，用于一键转换深色模式和夜间模式。

english: user acceptance
chinese: 用户接受度

english: In AI digital human work, user acceptance was as important as technical novelty.
chinese: 在 AI 数字人项目中，用户接受度和技术新颖性同样重要。

english: trust mechanism
chinese: 信任机制

english: AI products need trust mechanisms that help users understand what the system can and cannot do.
chinese: AI 产品需要信任机制，帮助用户理解系统能做什么、不能做什么。

english: emotional dependence
chinese: 情感依赖

english: Duxiaoxiao made me aware that emotional dependence on AI assistants can become a serious long-term design issue.
chinese: 度晓晓让我意识到，对 AI 助手的情感依赖可能成为长期严肃的设计议题。

english: privacy concern
chinese: 隐私顾虑

english: In multimodal AI interaction, privacy concerns can strongly affect whether users feel comfortable engaging.
chinese: 在多模态 AI 交互中，隐私顾虑会强烈影响用户是否愿意参与。

english: optimized for efficiency
chinese: 为效率而优化

english: Search is usually optimized for efficiency, so adding a virtual human had to be justified by real user value.
chinese: 搜索通常是为效率而优化的，因此加入数字人必须有真实用户价值支撑。

english: long-term human-AI relationship
chinese: 人与 AI 的长期关系

english: I believe long-term human-AI relationships involve not only usefulness, but also trust, boundaries, and responsibility.
chinese: 我认为长期人机关系不仅涉及有用性，也涉及信任、边界和责任。

english: design as a strategic function
chinese: 作为战略职能的设计
highlightOverrides: design into a more strategic function

english: A consistent theme in my career has been turning design into a more strategic function inside product organizations.
chinese: 我职业经历中持续的主题，是把设计变成产品组织中更具战略性的职能。

english: treatment group
chinese: 实验组

english: The treatment group saw the redesigned homepage, while the control group stayed on the existing version.
chinese: 实验组看到了改版后的首页，而对照组继续使用现有版本。

english: control group
chinese: 对照组

english: We compared the treatment group against the control group to measure the impact of the redesign.
chinese: 我们将实验组和对照组进行比较，以衡量改版的影响。

english: bridge design and engineering
chinese: 连接设计与工程

english: Because I understand frontend and Web3D implementation, I often bridge design and engineering when the interaction is hard to explain with static screens.
chinese: 因为我理解前端和 Web3D 实现，所以当交互很难用静态页面解释时，我经常连接设计与工程。

english: turn ambiguity into a clear path
chinese: 把模糊问题变成清晰路径

english: On Duxiaoxiao, my role was to turn ambiguity into a clear path across interaction design, AI capabilities, 3D assets, and commercial use cases.
chinese: 在度晓晓项目中，我的角色是把交互设计、AI 能力、3D 资产和商业场景中的模糊问题变成清晰路径。

english: drive cross-functional alignment
chinese: 推动跨职能对齐

english: A major part of my work at Baidu was driving cross-functional alignment across product, engineering, data, growth, and design teams.
chinese: 我在百度工作中很重要的一部分，是推动产品、工程、数据、增长和设计团队之间的跨职能对齐。

english: balance user needs and business goals
chinese: 平衡用户需求和业务目标

english: On the Baidu App homepage, I had to balance user needs and business goals because the page carried search, content discovery, and monetization at the same time.
chinese: 在百度 App 首页项目中，我必须平衡用户需求和业务目标，因为这个页面同时承载搜索、内容发现和商业化。

english: connect design decisions to business outcomes
chinese: 把设计决策连接到业务结果

english: I try to connect design decisions to business outcomes, such as how the 2019 homepage redesign contributed to engagement and estimated annualized revenue growth.
chinese: 我会尽量把设计决策连接到业务结果，比如 2019 年首页改版如何促进参与度和预估年化收入增长。

english: reduce implementation risk
chinese: 降低实现风险

english: I use high-fidelity prototypes to reduce implementation risk before engineering teams invest heavily in complex motion or AI interactions.
chinese: 我使用高保真原型，在工程团队大量投入复杂动效或 AI 交互之前降低实现风险。

english: validate ideas with real users
chinese: 用真实用户验证想法

english: For Baidu App and Duxiaoxiao, I was able to validate ideas with real users in high-traffic production environments.
chinese: 在百度 App 和度晓晓项目中，我能够在高流量生产环境中用真实用户验证想法。

english: test at scale
chinese: 大规模验证

english: Working on Baidu App taught me how to test at scale, where even small design changes needed careful experiment design and rollout.
chinese: 百度 App 的经历让我学会如何大规模验证，因为即使是小的设计变化也需要谨慎的实验设计和上线策略。

english: define the first version of the experience
chinese: 定义体验的第一个版本

english: For Duxiaoxiao, I helped define the first version of the experience, including how a digital human should enter search, respond, and hand off to results.
chinese: 在度晓晓项目中，我帮助定义了体验的第一个版本，包括数字人如何进入搜索、回应用户并切换到搜索结果。

english: bring an AI capability into a real user flow
chinese: 把 AI 能力带入真实用户流程

english: The challenge was not just the AI capability itself, but how to bring an AI capability into a real user flow inside Baidu App.
chinese: 挑战不只是 AI 能力本身，而是如何把 AI 能力带入百度 App 内真实的用户流程。

english: make AI feel understandable
chinese: 让 AI 变得可理解

english: In Duxiaoxiao, I focused on making AI feel understandable through voice, facial expressions, motion, and clear interaction states.
chinese: 在度晓晓中，我关注通过语音、表情、动作和清晰交互状态让 AI 变得可理解。

english: build trust through interaction design
chinese: 通过交互设计建立信任

english: I believe AI products need to build trust through interaction design, especially when users need to understand when the system is answering, searching, or switching modes.
chinese: 我认为 AI 产品需要通过交互设计建立信任，尤其是当用户需要理解系统是在回答、搜索还是切换模式时。

english: support both task efficiency and emotional response
chinese: 同时支持任务效率和情感反馈

english: Duxiaoxiao was challenging because the experience needed to support both task efficiency and emotional response inside a search product.
chinese: 度晓晓极具挑战性，因为其体验需要在搜索产品内同时支持任务效率和情感反馈。

english: design within platform constraints
chinese: 在平台约束下设计

english: I am used to designing within platform constraints, including existing user habits, business requirements, technical stacks, and release timelines.
chinese: 我习惯在平台约束下做设计，包括既有用户习惯、业务需求、技术栈和发布节奏。

english: improve consistency across teams
chinese: 提升跨团队一致性

english: My design infrastructure work improved consistency across teams by turning repeated decisions into shared standards and reusable patterns.
chinese: 我的设计基础设施工作通过把重复决策转化为共享标准和可复用模式，提升了跨团队一致性。

english: turn repeated problems into reusable patterns
chinese: 把重复问题变成可复用模式

english: In Baidu App, I often turned repeated problems into reusable patterns, especially for homepage campaigns, dark mode, and motion design.
chinese: 在百度 App，我经常把重复问题变成可复用模式，尤其是在首页活动、深色模式和动效设计中。

english: create standards other teams can adopt
chinese: 建立其他团队可采用的标准
highlightOverrides: created standards other teams could adopt

english: For dark mode, we created standards other teams could adopt across Baidu's mobile product ecosystem.
chinese: 在深色模式项目中，我们建立了百度移动产品生态中其他团队也可以采用的标准。

english: protect the core user experience
chinese: 保护核心用户体验

english: When designing homepage monetization capabilities, I pushed for clear rules to protect the core user experience.
chinese: 在设计首页商业化能力时，我推动建立清晰规则来保护核心用户体验。

english: prevent promotions from overwhelming the homepage
chinese: 防止营销活动过度占据首页

english: We created placement and review rules to prevent promotions from overwhelming the homepage while still supporting business needs.
chinese: 我们建立了位置和评审规则，防止营销活动过度占据首页，同时仍然支持业务需求。

english: improve content discovery
chinese: 改善内容发现

english: The Baidu App homepage redesign improved content discovery by giving the algorithmic feed a clearer role in the overall experience.
chinese: 百度 App 首页改版通过让算法信息流在整体体验中承担更清晰的角色，改善了内容发现。

english: shift from active search to passive discovery
chinese: 从主动搜索转向被动发现

english: Part of Baidu App's evolution was a shift from active search to passive discovery, while still preserving search as the core capability.
chinese: 百度 App 演进中的一部分，是从主动搜索转向被动发现，同时仍然保留搜索作为核心能力。

english: guide users toward relevant content
chinese: 引导用户找到相关内容

english: On the homepage, our goal was to guide users toward relevant content without making the product feel noisy or overly commercial.
chinese: 在首页上，我们的目标是引导用户找到相关内容，同时避免产品显得嘈杂或过度商业化。

english: increase engagement without hurting clarity
chinese: 提升参与度但不损害清晰度

english: In the homepage redesign, we tried to increase engagement without hurting clarity, which meant balancing feed prominence with a clean search experience.
chinese: 在首页改版中，我们试图提升参与度但不损害清晰度，这意味着要平衡信息流突出度和清爽的搜索体验。

english: use data without losing product judgment
chinese: 使用数据但不丢失产品判断

english: I use data without losing product judgment, because metrics need to be interpreted alongside user behavior, product strategy, and research feedback.
chinese: 我使用数据但不会丢失产品判断，因为指标需要结合用户行为、产品策略和研究反馈来解读。

english: combine qualitative insight with quantitative validation
chinese: 结合定性洞察和定量验证

english: In strategic design work, I combine qualitative insight with quantitative validation so the team can understand both the why and the scale of a problem.
chinese: 在战略性设计工作中，我结合定性洞察和定量验证，让团队既理解问题的原因，也理解问题的规模。

english: interpret metrics in context
chinese: 结合语境解读指标

english: For homepage experiments, I tried to interpret metrics in context instead of treating DAU, time spent, or conversion as isolated numbers.
chinese: 在首页实验中，我会结合语境解读指标，而不是把日活、时长或转化当成孤立数字。

english: make the case with evidence
chinese: 用证据说明观点

english: When I advocated for homepage changes, I made the case with evidence from experiments, user research, market trends, and product strategy.
chinese: 当我推动首页变化时，我会用实验、用户研究、市场趋势和产品策略中的证据来说明观点。

english: earn trust from stakeholders
chinese: 赢得利益相关方信任

english: I earned trust from stakeholders by being specific about trade-offs and by connecting design proposals to user and business outcomes.
chinese: 我通过具体说明取舍，并把设计方案连接到用户和业务结果，赢得利益相关方信任。

english: influence without direct authority
chinese: 在没有直接权力时施加影响

english: Many of my Baidu App projects required me to influence without direct authority because the work depended on many parallel business and engineering teams.
chinese: 我的许多百度 App 项目都需要在没有直接权力的情况下施加影响，因为工作依赖多个并行的业务和工程团队。

english: stay hands-on while leading a team
chinese: 带团队时仍保持一线参与

english: Even while leading a team of designers and 3D artists, I stayed hands-on on the most important Duxiaoxiao experience and system design work.
chinese: 即使在带领设计师和 3D 艺术家团队时，我仍然在度晓晓最重要的体验和系统设计工作中保持一线参与。

english: coach designers through complex projects
chinese: 指导设计师完成复杂项目

english: As a design lead, I coached designers through complex projects involving AI interaction, 3D assets, product constraints, and cross-functional delivery.
chinese: 作为设计负责人，我指导设计师完成涉及 AI 交互、3D 资产、产品约束和跨职能交付的复杂项目。

english: turn individual expertise into a team capability
chinese: 把个人能力转化为团队能力

english: Teaching high-fidelity prototyping at Baidu helped me turn individual expertise into a team capability.
chinese: 在百度教授高保真原型课程，帮助我把个人能力转化为团队能力。

english: explain complex ideas through prototypes
chinese: 用原型解释复杂想法

english: I often explain complex ideas through prototypes, especially when the work involves motion, AI, 3D characters, or new interaction models.
chinese: 我经常用原型解释复杂想法，尤其是当工作涉及动效、AI、3D 角色或新交互模型时。

english: make abstract concepts tangible
chinese: 让抽象概念变得具体

english: For Duxiaoxiao, prototypes helped make abstract concepts tangible for product, engineering, AI, and 3D teams.
chinese: 在度晓晓项目中，原型帮助产品、工程、AI 和 3D 团队把抽象概念变得具体。

english: at the intersection of design, AI, and product strategy
chinese: 在设计、AI 和产品策略的交叉处

english: Much of my recent work sits at the intersection of design, AI, and product strategy, especially through Duxiaoxiao and AI search exploration.
chinese: 我近年的很多工作处在设计、AI 和产品策略的交叉处，尤其体现在度晓晓和 AI 搜索探索中。

english: bring a systems lens to product design
chinese: 用系统视角做产品设计

english: I bring a systems lens to product design, which helps me think beyond individual screens and design for patterns, rules, and long-term consistency.
chinese: 我用系统视角做产品设计，这帮助我跳出单个页面，从模式、规则和长期一致性角度设计。

english: operate in complex product environments
chinese: 在复杂产品环境中工作

english: I am comfortable operating in complex product environments where user needs, business pressure, technical constraints, and organizational constraints all matter.
chinese: 我很适应在复杂产品环境中工作，在这种环境里，用户需求、业务压力、技术约束和组织约束都很重要。
